ab: ajin monikapoan!
ngaran ko, Si.NGazamo, sicyawan am, ko asangernan so kakawakawan.
en: My name is Si.NGazamo, and I’m 10 years old.

ab: ngaran ko Si.NGazamo.
anak do ajin a yancominco imo?
en: What ethnic group are you from?

ab: anak no tao do pongso ko.
kanyo madadaya saka vahay ya yancomin?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: noon namen mamimin na Tao.
ch: B:是的，我們全家都是達悟族。
en: Yes, my whole family is Yami.

ab: kanyo madadaya saka vahay ya yancomin?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: beken, tao do pongso si.yama, dehdeh si ina.
ch: B:不是，我的爸爸是達悟族，我的媽媽是漢人。
en: No, my father is Yami, and my mother is Han Taiwanese.

ab: sino anak imo?
anak na yaken snyaman Mangai.
syama mo ito? yana apira kakawakawan na?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: yana anemangernan o kakawaawan na.
syamamo ito? yana pira o kakawakawan na?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: beken, iyam rarakeh do ili namen, yana waongernan so kakawakawan na.
ch: B:不是，他是我們部落的耆老，他80歲了。
en: No, he is an elder of our tribe. He is 80 years old.

ab: yana apira kakawakawan nikakamo a meakay?
yana awoa so ikarwangernan o kakawakawan ni kaka a meakay.
ya rako wawang no kakawakawan na jimo nikaka mo a meakay?
ch: A:你哥哥年紀比你大很多嗎?
en: Is your brother much older than you?

ab: namen alima kakawakawan so awang.
ya apira mo ka karangan?
ko apata angernan asa poo so kakarakarang.
tana mownay jini misinkad, kakmi ya nimipakarang?
ch: A:好久不見，你是不是長高了?
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. Have you grown taller?

ab: nonan, kona atlo a ngernan asapoo so kakarakarang.
kakmi ya nimipatava?
jyabo, yamalas mo citan sya.
ka nimi pagozang?
jyabo, ko nimi patava.
ka nimi patava?
noon, ya atlo angernan ko karehrehmet.
